mapper.update: UPDATE pr_heat_reading a LEFT JOIN pr_heat_hot_archive b ON a.meter_num = b.meter_num LEFT JOIN ( SELECT open_time, close_time, org_id FROM pr_options_heat GROUP BY org_id ) c ON c.org_id = b.org_id SET a.is_valid = '1' WHERE b.org_id = #{orgId} AND a.create_time BETWEEN c.open_time AND c.close_time AND DATE_FORMAT(a.create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') = DATE_FORMAT(#{date}, '%Y-%m-%d')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pr_heat_daily ( id, meter_num, meter_arc_code, current_reading, in_temperature, out_temperature, setting_status, voltage, read_time, daily_date, update_time ) SELECT CAST(CONV(SUBSTRING(REPLACE(UUID(), '-', ''), 18, 14), 16, 10) AS SIGNED), a.meter_num, a.meter_arc_code, IFNULL(a.total_heat, 0), a.in_temperature, a.out_temperature, a.setting_status, a.voltage, a.create_time, #{date}, NOW() FROM pr_heat_reading a LEFT JOIN ( SELECT meter_num, MAX(create_time) as create_time FROM pr_heat_reading WHERE (meter_arc_code LIKE CONCAT('040303', '%') OR meter_arc_code LIKE CONCAT('040301', '%')) AND DATE_FORMAT(create_time, '%Y-%m-%d') = DATE_FORMAT(#{date}, '%Y-%m-%d') GROUP BY meter_num ) b ON a.meter_num = b.meter_num LEFT JOIN pr_heat_hot_archive c ON c.meter_num = a.meter_num WHERE a.is_valid = '1' AND c.org_id = #{orgId} AND c.is_changed = '0' AND DATE_FORMAT(a.create_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') = DATE_FORMAT(b.create_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') GROUP BY meter_num
mapper.update: UPDATE pr_heat_daily a LEFT JOIN pr_heat_hot_archive b ON a.meter_num = b.meter_num SET a.meter_id = b.id, a.card_num = b.card_num, a.start_reading = IFNULL(b.current_reading, 0), a.standard_price = IFNULL(b.standard_price, 0), a.is_calc = '0', a.house_id = b.house_id, a.org_id = b.org_id WHERE b.org_id = #{orgId} AND a.meter_num = b.meter_num AND b.is_changed = '0' AND DATE_FORMAT(a.daily_date, '%Y-%m-%d') = DATE_FORMAT(#{date}, '%Y-%m-%d')

UPDATE pr_heat_daily SET qty = current_reading - start_reading, is_calc = '1', total_money = ROUND(standard_price * (current_reading - start_reading), 2), calc_date = NOW() WHERE org_id = #{orgId} AND DATE_FORMAT(daily_date, '%Y-%m-%d') = DATE_FORMAT(#{date}, '%Y-%m-%d')

UPDATE pr_heat_hot_archive a LEFT JOIN pr_heat_daily b ON a.meter_num = b.meter_num SET a.current_reading = b.current_reading, a.total_used = b.current_reading - a.start_reading, a.current_balance = a.total_recharge - (IFNULL(a.total_money, 0) + b.total_money), a.total_money = IFNULL(a.total_money, 0) + b.total_money WHERE b.org_id = #{orgId} AND DATE_FORMAT(b.daily_date, '%Y-%m-%d') = DATE_FORMAT(#{date}, '%Y-%m-%d')
mapper.select: SELECT d.meter_num, d.card_num, d.meter_id, d.meter_arc_code, 0 AS start_reading, 0 AS current_reading, SUM(IFNULL(d.qty, 0)) AS qty, CONCAT(#{year}, LPAD(#{month}, 2, '0')) AS record_ym, SUM(IFNULL(d.total_money, 0)) AS total_money, 0 AS is_audit, 0 AS is_hiscalc, 0 AS current_balance, 0 AS recharge_money, 0 AS pay_degrees, 0 AS current_arrearage, 0 AS add_arrearage, 0 AS add_advances, d.house_id, d.org_id FROM pr_heat_daily d WHERE d.org_id = #{orgId} AND YEAR(d.daily_date) = #{year} AND MONTH(d.daily_date) = #{month} AND d.house_id IS NOT NULL AND d.qty > 0 GROUP BY d.house_id, d.meter_id, d.meter_num, d.meter_arc_code, d.card_num, d.org_id ORDER BY d.house_id
